license.name: Government of India Open Data License

indicator.title: State GDP (₹ crore, current and constant prices)
indicator.description: Per-state GSDP (Gross State Domestic Product) in ₹ crore, faceted by price basis. Use 'current' for share-of-national rankings, 'constant' for state-level growth-rate analysis. Coverage varies by state — small states/UTs only enter the series after they were carved out (Telangana from 2014-15, Ladakh from 2019-20).
indicator.methodology_vintage: MoSPI per-state GSDP series. Constant prices rebased to 2011-12. Compiled by State Directorates of Economics & Statistics with MoSPI methodology guidance.
indicator.notes: GSDP is the within-state production view; for who-consumes-what, see per-capita consumption. State totals will not sum exactly to national GDP because of differences in base years and revision timing across the 36 state-level series.

series_breaks.note: Telangana bifurcated from Andhra Pradesh; pre-2014 AP rows include Telangana.
Ladakh bifurcated from J&K; pre-2019 J&K rows include Ladakh.
